Reducing Device in Bed Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that a pressure reducing device is used in the resident's bed. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
451 M1200C_TRNG_PGM_CD M1200C_TRNG_PGM_CD M1200C Skin and Ulcer Treatments: Turning/Repositioning Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that a turning/repositioning program is in place for the resident. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
